scripts.setup: node scripts/check-prereqs.mjs && npm install && npm run sidecar:build
scripts.start: npm run sidecar:build && npm run dev -w app
scripts.build: npm run sidecar:build && npm run build -w app
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w app && npm run sidecar:lint
scripts.test: npm run test -w app && npm run sidecar:test
